title: NVIDIA Vera Rubin Driving Performance Per Watt, Lowest Token Cost for Partners Worldwide
excerpt: Backed by 300 global partners, Vera Rubin is ramping up worldwide. NVIDIA partners CoreWeave, Google Cloud, Microsoft Azure and Mistral are among many deploying Vera Rubin, which delivers benchmark leadership on performance per watt and lowest token costs.
content_html:
NVIDIA Vera Rubin is here, and it’s going gigascale.

Vera Rubin NVL72 production is ramping up with racks running at partners CoreWeave, Google Cloud, Microsoft Azure and Oracle Cloud Infrastructure. Spanning 350+ factory sites in 30 countries, Vera Rubin has the largest, most mature rack-scale supply chain ever assembled to meet customer compute demand.

The Vera Rubin platform is built from chip to grid to deliver the highest performance per watt and the lowest token cost. CoreWeave’s first benchmark on DeepSeek-R1 says it all: 10x more throughput per megawatt than Grace Blackwell NVL72 — landing directly on the metric that matters most for power-constrained AI factories.

Advancing Performance With Extreme Codesign

What makes this possible is extreme codesign across seven chips and five rack trays — Vera Rubin NVL72, Vera CPU rack, Groq 3 LPX, Spectrum-6 SPX and Vera BlueField-4 STX — all engineered as a single system rather than assembled from separate off-the-shelf products. 

The NVIDIA Vera CPU is at its center. It redefines what an AI factory CPU can be. Designed and built for the agent era, its custom Olympus core delivers 2x single-threaded performance, 3x core-to-core bandwidth and 40% lower memory latency versus competing chiplet designs, making it the most efficient single-threaded CPU for the agentic workloads that matter most.  

Accelerating AI Factories With Purpose-Built Networking 

For networking, the platform’s sixth-generation NVLink scale-up delivers more than 2x throughput on complex workloads, 3x lower latency and 10x higher packet rates than off-the-shelf Ethernet. For scale-out, Spectrum-X Ethernet combines 102.4T Spectrum-6 switch systems, 1.6T ConnectX-9 SuperNICs, adaptive routing, advanced congestion control, telemetry and open operating system support, enabling 1.6x higher RDMA bandwidth than off-the-shelf Ethernet. 

The world’s leading AI infrastructure builders — including CoreWeave, Microsoft, SpaceXAI and Tesla — are among the first to bring in Spectrum-6 switches to accelerate their AI factories. NVIDIA Photonics with co-packaged optics for scale-out — the industry’s first such switch in volume manufacturing — adds 5x lower power and 10x higher MTBI versus pluggable transceivers, with CoreWeave, Lambda and OCI among the first adopters. 

Spectrum-XGS Ethernet extends performance across sites with 1.9x multi-site throughput because gigascale AI isn’t a single building problem. 

And NVLink Fusion opens the NVIDIA infrastructure platform to third-party XPUs, giving partners a faster path to market on the proven NVLink scale-up stack and ecosystem.

Saving Setup Time, Water 

NVIDIA’s three generations of rack-scale codesign produced a Vera Rubin NVL72 system with no cables, fans or hoses in the tray, cutting compute tray assembly time from hours to one minute. 

A 45-degree Celsius liquid cooling inlet temperature design enables chiller-free dry-cooler operation. For new AI factories, this higher-temperature dry cooling along with the closed-loop liquid cooling system saves millions of gallons of water per megawatt annually.

Tuesday, July 21, 8:00 a.m. PT 🔗

NVIDIA Vera Rubin Powers Europe’s Open Model Era

Vera Rubin is delivering next-generation performance to Europe’s AI infrastructure.

It’s the foundation for a newly expanded Microsoft and Mistral partnership that brings frontier AI to the region, combining open European models with cloud and customer-controlled environments so governments and regulated industries can adopt it on their own terms.

Underpinning the partnership is a new multibillion-dollar agreement focused on expanding AI infrastructure in Europe. Mistral is adding its GPU capacity, drawing on thousands of the latest NVIDIA Vera Rubin GPUs to increase AI compute availability for customers and provide a shared platform for training, inference and large-scale deployment.

NVIDIA Vera Rubin is ramping into full production. The rack-scale AI supercomputer unifies seven new chips codesigned as one system, and it will power the next generation of Mistral Compute and Microsoft’s European AI infrastructure, drawing on tens of thousands of GPUs.

Europe wants the world’s most capable AI, running under its own laws, close to home, and fully within its control. And the bar keeps rising: agentic systems can consume up to 15x more tokens than traditional AI applications, making efficient infrastructure a strategic priority. Meeting that expectation takes more than computing capacity: AI that scales efficiently while satisfying regional requirements for data control, governance, resilience and strategic autonomy.

Vera Rubin provides the computing foundation for Europe’s open-model ecosystem. Its full-stack architecture combines accelerated computing, networking and software so models and agents run efficiently from training through production. 

Open Models Built for Enterprise AI

Together, Microsoft, Mistral and NVIDIA are delivering sovereign-ready AI across public cloud, cloud-connected and fully disconnected private cloud environments — pairing the flexibility of open models with the infrastructure required to operate them at scale.

Mistral Medium 3.5 and OCR 4 are now available in Microsoft Foundry, and Mistral models are integrated into Microsoft Copilot Studio. Through Azure Local and Foundry Local, customers can use the same models, tools and operating patterns across cloud and customer-controlled environments.

AI on Europe’s Terms

Government agencies can apply AI to sensitive workflows. Healthcare and financial services organizations can deploy within regional requirements. Manufacturers can process data on site for faster decisions. Compared with NVIDIA GB200 NVL72, Vera Rubin NVL72 delivers up to 10x more tokens per megawatt and one-tenth the cost per million tokens, providing more intelligence within the same power footprint.

Sovereign AI should not force organizations to choose among innovation, economics and control. With Vera Rubin as the computing foundation — and Microsoft and Mistral delivering sovereign cloud infrastructure and open European models — Europe can pursue all three.

Read the Microsoft and Mistral press release for more details.

Tuesday, July 21, 8:00 a.m. PT 🔗

NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 on CoreWeave Demonstrates 10x More Tokens Per Megawatt Than Blackwell in Benchmark

Embracing extreme codesign with NVIDIA, CoreWeave is delivering an order-of-magnitude performance leap on Vera Rubin NVL72. 

Close collaboration with partners like CoreWeave is mission-critical to bringing up a new generation of NVIDIA accelerated computing into AI factories. 

After months of co-engineering work, CoreWeave became the first AI cloud to bring up and validate Vera Rubin NVL72 — and it is now sharing the first measured performance numbers from live hardware.

CoreWeave ran a DeepSeek-R1 benchmark on Vera Rubin NVL72 and saw 10x improvement in tokens per second per megawatt compared with Grace Blackwell NVL72. 

Tokens per megawatt is the metric that determines whether AI infrastructure can profitably scale. More tokens per megawatt means more intelligence from the same power budget, or the same workload on significantly less power. AI labs and enterprises such as Jane Street will use the Vera Rubin platform to scale its AI factories on the CoreWeave cloud.   

Beating Bottlenecks With NVIDIA Spectrum-X

DeepSeek R1’s mixture-of-experts architecture makes all-to-all GPU communication a critical requirement at scale: Each token must be routed across distributed expert sub-networks. Vera Rubin NVL72’s 260 TB/s all-to-all NVLink 6 fabric removes that constraint, enabling the rack to behave as a single unified accelerator. 

CoreWeave is among the first to deploy the NVIDIA Spectrum-X Ethernet SN6600-LD as the switching fabric for Vera Rubin NVL72. 

Built on the 102.4 Tb/s Spectrum-6 switch chip and featuring a liquid-cooled design, CoreWeave deploys dense switching racks, delivering 1.64 Pb/s per rack with 100% more capacity than previous-generation air-cooled switches. CoreWeave also provides a fully non-blocking, multi-plane, multi-rail spine and leaf fabric connecting Vera Rubin NVL72 GPUs without oversubscription.

Tuesday, July 21, 8:00 a.m. PT 🔗

NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 Drives New Google Cloud A5X Instance for Ineffable Intelligence

NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 is powering Google Cloud’s first A5X instance, now up and running for London startup Ineffable Intelligence.

Ineffable Intelligence develops a new generation of intelligent “superlearner” systems that continuously learn through experience to discover new breakthroughs across all fields.

Ineffable Intelligence’s agents learn directly from interaction with their environments, rather than from static datasets. Instead of using large language models, Ineffable is developing “superlearner” systems through reinforcement learning, generating experience across continuously simulated, massively parallel environments and rapidly translating that experience into policy updates and evaluation. These tightly coupled learning loops place exceptional demands on compute, memory bandwidth and interconnect, requiring infrastructure that can operate at enormous scale with extremely low latency.

“The next era of research requires the next era of hardware,” said Lasse Espeholt, cofounder of Ineffable Intelligence. “We feel privileged to work with the teams at NVIDIA and Google Cloud, who were able to grant us early access to Vera Rubin. The support across both teams has been unmatched; we were up and running almost immediately and are already testing infra for our superlearners.”

NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 is designed for this kind of agentic training, delivering predictable latency, high utilization and significantly more intelligence per dollar than previous-generation systems, making it a natural platform choice for large-scale reinforcement learning.

Google Cloud A5X instances, announced at Google Cloud Next, are bare-metal instances built on NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 rack-scale systems, delivering up to 10x lower inference cost per token and 10x higher token throughput per megawatt than the prior generation. 

A5X uses NVIDIA ConnectX‑9 SuperNICs combined with next-generation Google Virgo networking, enabling clusters that can scale to tens of thousands of NVIDIA Rubin GPUs within a single site and up to nearly a million GPUs across multisite configurations, giving customers a unified, AI‑optimized stack for training, tuning and serving frontier, open, agentic and physical AI models while optimizing for performance, cost and sustainability.

This infrastructure is designed to help unlock the next generation of reinforcement learning systems for breakthroughs in superlearning and superintelligence.

Tuesday, July 21, 8:00 a.m. PT 🔗

NVIDIA Vera CPU Doubles Orchestration Speed for DeepInfra AI Cloud

Benchmark results from DeepInfra show that the NVIDIA Vera CPU is more than twice as fast and can support more concurrent AI agents compared with other CPUs.

Cloud platform DeepInfra, an early access participant in the NVIDIA open AI ecosystem, independently designed and ran benchmarks using its production AI agent infrastructure. DeepInfra processes nearly 5 trillion tokens a week, with about 30% driven by agentic systems. Its cloud platform is built for high-throughput AI inference. 

The benchmarks demonstrate support for up to 1.6x more concurrent AI agents at the same quality of service and up to 2.2x faster orchestration than alternative CPUs, while improving infrastructure utilization and cost efficiency. These results show that the NVIDIA Vera CPU delivers the cost efficiency, low latency and throughput that production agentic AI demands.

As AI agents take on more complex reasoning, planning, tool use and data movement, CPU performance has become increasingly important for orchestrating work around each model call. 

Part of NVIDIA’s extreme codesign approach to AI factories, the Vera CPU is built for agentic workloads. DeepInfra’s benchmark highlights how the NVIDIA Vera CPU helps cloud providers improve infrastructure utilization, increase cost efficiency and support more concurrent AI agents at the same quality of service.

Learn more about the NVIDIA Vera Rubin platform.

blocks.html_en: And NVLink Fusion opens the NVIDIA infrastructure platform to third-party XPUs, giving partners a faster path to market on the proven NVLink scale-up stack and ecosystem.

sentences.en: And NVLink Fusion opens the NVIDIA infrastructure platform to third-party XPUs, giving partners a faster path to market on the proven NVLink scale-up stack and ecosystem.

blocks.html_en: Saving Setup Time, Water

sentences.en: Saving Setup Time, Water
sentences.zh: 节省设置时间和水

blocks.html_en: NVIDIA’s three generations of rack-scale codesign produced a Vera Rubin NVL72 system with no cables, fans or hoses in the tray, cutting compute tray assembly time from hours to one minute.

sentences.en: NVIDIA’s three generations of rack-scale codesign produced a Vera Rubin NVL72 system with no cables, fans or hoses in the tray, cutting compute tray assembly time from hours to one minute.
sentences.zh: NVIDIA 的三代机架级协同设计产生了 Vera Rubin NVL72 系统，托盘中没有电缆、风扇或软管，将计算托盘组装时间从几小时缩短到一分钟。

blocks.html_en: A 45-degree Celsius liquid cooling inlet temperature design enables chiller-free dry-cooler operation. For new AI factories, this higher-temperature dry cooling along with the closed-loop liquid cooling system saves millions of gallons of water per megawatt annually.

sentences.en: A 45-degree Celsius liquid cooling inlet temperature design enables chiller-free dry-cooler operation.

sentences.en: For new AI factories, this higher-temperature dry cooling along with the closed-loop liquid cooling system saves millions of gallons of water per megawatt annually.

blocks.html_en: NVIDIA Vera Rubin Powers Europe’s Open Model Era

sentences.en: NVIDIA Vera Rubin Powers Europe’s Open Model Era
sentences.zh: NVIDIA Vera Rubin 为欧洲开放模式时代提供动力

blocks.html_en: Vera Rubin is delivering next-generation performance to Europe’s AI infrastructure.

sentences.en: Vera Rubin is delivering next-generation performance to Europe’s AI infrastructure.
sentences.zh: Vera Rubin 正在为欧洲的人工智能基础设施提供下一代性能。

blocks.html_en: It’s the foundation for a newly expanded Microsoft and Mistral partnership that brings frontier AI to the region, combining open European models with cloud and customer-controlled environments so governments and regulated industries can adopt it on their own terms.

sentences.en: It’s the foundation for a newly expanded Microsoft and Mistral partnership that brings frontier AI to the region, combining open European models with cloud and customer-controlled environments so governments and regulated industries can adopt it on their own terms.
sentences.zh: 这是微软和米斯特拉尔新扩大的合作伙伴关系的基础，该合作伙伴关系将前沿人工智能引入该地区，将开放的欧洲模型与云和客户控制的环境相结合，以便政府和受监管行业可以按照自己的条件采用它。

blocks.html_en: Underpinning the partnership is a new multibillion-dollar agreement focused on expanding AI infrastructure in Europe. Mistral is adding its GPU capacity, drawing on thousands of the latest NVIDIA Vera Rubin GPUs to increase AI compute availability for customers and provide a shared platform for training, inference and large-scale deployment.

sentences.en: Underpinning the partnership is a new multibillion-dollar agreement focused on expanding AI infrastructure in Europe.
sentences.zh: 支撑这一合作伙伴关系的是一项价值数十亿美元的新协议，重点是扩大欧洲的人工智能基础设施。

sentences.en: Mistral is adding its GPU capacity, drawing on thousands of the latest NVIDIA Vera Rubin GPUs to increase AI compute availability for customers and provide a shared platform for training, inference and large-scale deployment.
sentences.zh: Mistral 正在增加其 GPU 容量，利用数千个最新的 NVIDIA Vera Rubin GPU 来提高客户的 AI 计算可用性，并为训练、推理和大规模部署提供共享平台。

blocks.html_en: NVIDIA Vera Rubin is ramping into full production. The rack-scale AI supercomputer unifies seven new chips codesigned as one system, and it will power the next generation of Mistral Compute and Microsoft’s European AI infrastructure, drawing on tens of thousands of GPUs.

sentences.en: NVIDIA Vera Rubin is ramping into full production.
sentences.zh: NVIDIA Vera Rubin 正在全面投入生产。

sentences.en: The rack-scale AI supercomputer unifies seven new chips codesigned as one system, and it will power the next generation of Mistral Compute and Microsoft’s European AI infrastructure, drawing on tens of thousands of GPUs.
sentences.zh: 这台机架级人工智能超级计算机将七个新芯片联合设计为一个系统，它将利用数万个 GPU 为下一代 Mistral Compute 和微软的欧洲人工智能基础设施提供动力。

blocks.html_en: Europe wants the world’s most capable AI, running under its own laws, close to home, and fully within its control. And the bar keeps rising: agentic systems can consume up to 15x more tokens than traditional AI applications, making efficient infrastructure a strategic priority. Meeting that expectation takes more than computing capacity: AI that scales efficiently while satisfying regional requirements for data control, governance, resilience and strategic autonomy.

sentences.en: Europe wants the world’s most capable AI, running under its own laws, close to home, and fully within its control.
sentences.zh: 欧洲希望世界上最有能力的人工智能，在自己的法律下运行，离家较近，并完全在自己的控制之下。

sentences.en: And the bar keeps rising: agentic systems can consume up to 15x more tokens than traditional AI applications, making efficient infrastructure a strategic priority.
sentences.zh: 而且门槛不断提高：代理系统消耗的代币比传统人工智能应用程序多 15 倍，使高效的基础设施成为战略重点。

sentences.en: Meeting that expectation takes more than computing capacity: AI that scales efficiently while satisfying regional requirements for data control, governance, resilience and strategic autonomy.
sentences.zh: 满足这一期望需要的不仅仅是计算能力：人工智能能够有效扩展，同时满足数据控制、治理、弹性和战略自主的区域要求。

blocks.html_en: Vera Rubin provides the computing foundation for Europe’s open-model ecosystem. Its full-stack architecture combines accelerated computing, networking and software so models and agents run efficiently from training through production.

sentences.en: Vera Rubin provides the computing foundation for Europe’s open-model ecosystem.
sentences.zh: Vera Rubin 为欧洲开放模式生态系统提供计算基础。

sentences.en: Its full-stack architecture combines accelerated computing, networking and software so models and agents run efficiently from training through production.
sentences.zh: 其全栈架构结合了加速计算、网络和软件，因此模型和代理从训练到生产都能高效运行。

blocks.html_en: Open Models Built for Enterprise AI

sentences.en: Open Models Built for Enterprise AI
sentences.zh: 为企业人工智能构建的开放模型

blocks.html_en: Together, Microsoft, Mistral and NVIDIA are delivering sovereign-ready AI across public cloud, cloud-connected and fully disconnected private cloud environments — pairing the flexibility of open models with the infrastructure required to operate them at scale.

sentences.en: Together, Microsoft, Mistral and NVIDIA are delivering sovereign-ready AI across public cloud, cloud-connected and fully disconnected private cloud environments — pairing the flexibility of open models with the infrastructure required to operate them at scale.
sentences.zh: Microsoft、Mistral 和 NVIDIA 正在共同跨公共云、云连接和完全断开连接的私有云环境提供主权就绪的 AI，将开放模型的灵活性与大规模运行模型所需的基础设施相结合。

blocks.html_en: Mistral Medium 3.5 and OCR 4 are now available in Microsoft Foundry, and Mistral models are integrated into Microsoft Copilot Studio. Through Azure Local and Foundry Local, customers can use the same models, tools and operating patterns across cloud and customer-controlled environments.

sentences.en: Mistral Medium 3.5 and OCR 4 are now available in Microsoft Foundry, and Mistral models are integrated into Microsoft Copilot Studio.
sentences.zh: Mistral Medium 3.5 和 OCR 4 现已在 Microsoft Foundry 中提供，并且 Mistral 模型已集成到 Microsoft Copilot Studio 中。

sentences.en: Through Azure Local and Foundry Local, customers can use the same models, tools and operating patterns across cloud and customer-controlled environments.
sentences.zh: 通过 Azure Local 和 Foundry Local，客户可以在云和客户控制的环境中使用相同的模型、工具和操作模式。

blocks.html_en: AI on Europe’s Terms

sentences.en: AI on Europe’s Terms
sentences.zh: 符合欧洲条件的人工智能

blocks.html_en: Government agencies can apply AI to sensitive workflows. Healthcare and financial services organizations can deploy within regional requirements. Manufacturers can process data on site for faster decisions. Compared with NVIDIA GB200 NVL72, Vera Rubin NVL72 delivers up to 10x more tokens per megawatt and one-tenth the cost per million tokens, providing more intelligence within the same power footprint.

sentences.en: Government agencies can apply AI to sensitive workflows.
sentences.zh: 政府机构可以将人工智能应用于敏感的工作流程。

sentences.en: Healthcare and financial services organizations can deploy within regional requirements.
sentences.zh: 医疗保健和金融服务组织可以根据区域要求进行部署。

sentences.en: Manufacturers can process data on site for faster decisions.
sentences.zh: 制造商可以现场处理数据以更快地做出决策。

sentences.en: Compared with NVIDIA GB200 NVL72, Vera Rubin NVL72 delivers up to 10x more tokens per megawatt and one-tenth the cost per million tokens, providing more intelligence within the same power footprint.
sentences.zh: 与 NVIDIA GB200 NVL72 相比，Vera Rubin NVL72 每兆瓦的令牌数量增加了 10 倍，每百万令牌的成本降低了十分之一，从而在相同的功耗范围内提供了更多智能。

blocks.html_en: Sovereign AI should not force organizations to choose among innovation, economics and control. With Vera Rubin as the computing foundation — and Microsoft and Mistral delivering sovereign cloud infrastructure and open European models — Europe can pursue all three.

sentences.en: Sovereign AI should not force organizations to choose among innovation, economics and control.
sentences.zh: 主权人工智能不应强迫组织在创新、经济和控制之间做出选择。

sentences.en: With Vera Rubin as the computing foundation — and Microsoft and Mistral delivering sovereign cloud infrastructure and open European models — Europe can pursue all three.
sentences.zh: 以 Vera Rubin 作为计算基础，微软和 Mistral 提供主权云基础设施和开放的欧洲模式，欧洲可以实现这三个目标。

blocks.html_en: Read the Microsoft and Mistral press release for more details.

sentences.en: Read the Microsoft and Mistral press release for more details.
sentences.zh: 请阅读 Microsoft 和 Mistral 新闻稿了解更多详细信息。

blocks.html_en: NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 on CoreWeave Demonstrates 10x More Tokens Per Megawatt Than Blackwell in Benchmark

sentences.en: NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 on CoreWeave Demonstrates 10x More Tokens Per Megawatt Than Blackwell in Benchmark
sentences.zh: CoreWeave 上的 NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 在基准测试中每兆瓦的代币数量是 Blackwell 的 10 倍

blocks.html_en: Embracing extreme codesign with NVIDIA, CoreWeave is delivering an order-of-magnitude performance leap on Vera Rubin NVL72.

sentences.en: Embracing extreme codesign with NVIDIA, CoreWeave is delivering an order-of-magnitude performance leap on Vera Rubin NVL72.
sentences.zh: CoreWeave 采用与 NVIDIA 的极限协同设计，在 Vera Rubin NVL72 上实现了数量级的性能飞跃。

blocks.html_en: Close collaboration with partners like CoreWeave is mission-critical to bringing up a new generation of NVIDIA accelerated computing into AI factories.

sentences.en: Close collaboration with partners like CoreWeave is mission-critical to bringing up a new generation of NVIDIA accelerated computing into AI factories.
sentences.zh: 与 CoreWeave 等合作伙伴的密切合作对于将新一代 NVIDIA 加速计算引入 AI 工厂至关重要。

blocks.html_en: After months of co-engineering work, CoreWeave became the first AI cloud to bring up and validate Vera Rubin NVL72 — and it is now sharing the first measured performance numbers from live hardware.

sentences.en: After months of co-engineering work, CoreWeave became the first AI cloud to bring up and validate Vera Rubin NVL72 — and it is now sharing the first measured performance numbers from live hardware.
sentences.zh: 经过几个月的联合工程工作，CoreWeave 成为第一个启动并验证 Vera Rubin NVL72 的人工智能云，现在它正在分享来自实时硬件的第一个测量性能数据。

blocks.html_en: CoreWeave ran a DeepSeek-R1 benchmark on Vera Rubin NVL72 and saw 10x improvement in tokens per second per megawatt compared with Grace Blackwell NVL72.

sentences.en: CoreWeave ran a DeepSeek-R1 benchmark on Vera Rubin NVL72 and saw 10x improvement in tokens per second per megawatt compared with Grace Blackwell NVL72.
sentences.zh: CoreWeave 在 Vera Rubin NVL72 上运行 DeepSeek-R1 基准测试，发现与 Grace Blackwell NVL72 相比，每秒每兆瓦的令牌数提高了 10 倍。

blocks.html_en: Tokens per megawatt is the metric that determines whether AI infrastructure can profitably scale. More tokens per megawatt means more intelligence from the same power budget, or the same workload on significantly less power. AI labs and enterprises such as Jane Street will use the Vera Rubin platform to scale its AI factories on the CoreWeave cloud.

sentences.en: Tokens per megawatt is the metric that determines whether AI infrastructure can profitably scale.
sentences.zh: 每兆瓦代币是决定人工智能基础设施是否能够盈利扩展的指标。

sentences.en: More tokens per megawatt means more intelligence from the same power budget, or the same workload on significantly less power.
sentences.zh: 每兆瓦更多的令牌意味着在相同的功率预算下获得更多的智能，或者在显着降低的功率下实现相同的工作负载。

sentences.en: AI labs and enterprises such as Jane Street will use the Vera Rubin platform to scale its AI factories on the CoreWeave cloud.
sentences.zh: Jane Street 等人工智能实验室和企业将使用 Vera Rubin 平台在 CoreWeave 云上扩展其人工智能工厂。

blocks.html_en: Beating Bottlenecks With NVIDIA Spectrum-X

sentences.en: Beating Bottlenecks With NVIDIA Spectrum-X
sentences.zh: 使用 NVIDIA Spectrum-X 克服瓶颈

blocks.html_en: DeepSeek R1’s mixture-of-experts architecture makes all-to-all GPU communication a critical requirement at scale: Each token must be routed across distributed expert sub-networks. Vera Rubin NVL72’s 260 TB/s all-to-all NVLink 6 fabric removes that constraint, enabling the rack to behave as a single unified accelerator.

sentences.en: DeepSeek R1’s mixture-of-experts architecture makes all-to-all GPU communication a critical requirement at scale: Each token must be routed across distributed expert sub-networks.
sentences.zh: DeepSeek R1 的专家混合架构使所有 GPU 通信成为大规模的关键要求：每个令牌必须跨分布式专家子网络进行路由。

sentences.en: Vera Rubin NVL72’s 260 TB/s all-to-all NVLink 6 fabric removes that constraint, enabling the rack to behave as a single unified accelerator.
sentences.zh: Vera Rubin NVL72 的 260 TB/s 全面 NVLink 6 结构消除了这一限制，使机架能够充当单个统一加速器。

blocks.html_en: CoreWeave is among the first to deploy the NVIDIA Spectrum-X Ethernet SN6600-LD as the switching fabric for Vera Rubin NVL72.

sentences.en: CoreWeave is among the first to deploy the NVIDIA Spectrum-X Ethernet SN6600-LD as the switching fabric for Vera Rubin NVL72.
sentences.zh: CoreWeave 是首批部署 NVIDIA Spectrum-X 以太网 SN6600-LD 作为 Vera Rubin NVL72 交换结构的公司之一。

blocks.html_en: Built on the 102.4 Tb/s Spectrum-6 switch chip and featuring a liquid-cooled design, CoreWeave deploys dense switching racks, delivering 1.64 Pb/s per rack with 100% more capacity than previous-generation air-cooled switches. CoreWeave also provides a fully non-blocking, multi-plane, multi-rail spine and leaf fabric connecting Vera Rubin NVL72 GPUs without oversubscription.

sentences.en: Built on the 102.4 Tb/s Spectrum-6 switch chip and featuring a liquid-cooled design, CoreWeave deploys dense switching racks, delivering 1.64 Pb/s per rack with 100% more capacity than previous-generation air-cooled switches.
sentences.zh: CoreWeave 基于 102.4 Tb/s Spectrum-6 交换机芯片构建，采用液冷设计，部署密集交换机架，每个机架提供 1.64 Pb/s 的速度，容量比上一代风冷交换机高出 100%。

sentences.en: CoreWeave also provides a fully non-blocking, multi-plane, multi-rail spine and leaf fabric connecting Vera Rubin NVL72 GPUs without oversubscription.
sentences.zh: CoreWeave 还提供完全无阻塞、多平面、多轨脊叶结构，连接 Vera Rubin NVL72 GPU，无需超额认购。

blocks.html_en: NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 Drives New Google Cloud A5X Instance for Ineffable Intelligence

sentences.en: NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 Drives New Google Cloud A5X Instance for Ineffable Intelligence
sentences.zh: NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 驱动新的 Google Cloud A5X 实例，实现不可言喻的智能

blocks.html_en: <figcaption id="caption-attachment-96714">Google Cloud A5X instance powered by NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 and Google Virgo Network for data center scale-out fabric. Image courtesy of Google Cloud.</figcaption>

sentences.en: Google Cloud A5X instance powered by NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 and Google Virgo Network for data center scale-out fabric.
sentences.zh: 由 NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 和 Google Virgo Network 提供支持的 Google Cloud A5X 实例，用于数据中心横向扩展结构。

sentences.en: Image courtesy of Google Cloud.
sentences.zh: 图片由 Google Cloud 提供。

blocks.html_en: NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 is powering Google Cloud’s first A5X instance, now up and running for London startup Ineffable Intelligence.

sentences.en: NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 is powering Google Cloud’s first A5X instance, now up and running for London startup Ineffable Intelligence.
sentences.zh: NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 正在为 Google Cloud 的第一个 A5X 实例提供支持，该实例现已为伦敦初创公司 Ineffable Intelligence 启动并运行。

blocks.html_en: Ineffable Intelligence develops a new generation of intelligent “superlearner” systems that continuously learn through experience to discover new breakthroughs across all fields.

sentences.en: Ineffable Intelligence develops a new generation of intelligent “superlearner” systems that continuously learn through experience to discover new breakthroughs across all fields.
sentences.zh: Ineffable Intelligence开发了新一代智能“超级学习者”系统，通过经验不断学习，以发现各个领域的新突破。

blocks.html_en: Ineffable Intelligence’s agents learn directly from interaction with their environments, rather than from static datasets. Instead of using large language models, Ineffable is developing “superlearner” systems through reinforcement learning, generating experience across continuously simulated, massively parallel environments and rapidly translating that experience into policy updates and evaluation. These tightly coupled learning loops place exceptional demands on compute, memory bandwidth and interconnect, requiring infrastructure that can operate at enormous scale with extremely low latency.

sentences.en: Ineffable Intelligence’s agents learn directly from interaction with their environments, rather than from static datasets.
sentences.zh: Ineffable Intelligence 的智能体直接从与环境的交互中学习，而不是从静态数据集中学习。

sentences.en: Instead of using large language models, Ineffable is developing “superlearner” systems through reinforcement learning, generating experience across continuously simulated, massively parallel environments and rapidly translating that experience into policy updates and evaluation.
sentences.zh: Ineffable 没有使用大型语言模型，而是通过强化学习开发“超级学习器”系统​​，在持续模拟、大规模并行的环境中生成经验，并将该经验快速转化为政策更新和评估。

sentences.en: These tightly coupled learning loops place exceptional demands on compute, memory bandwidth and interconnect, requiring infrastructure that can operate at enormous scale with extremely low latency.
sentences.zh: 这些紧密耦合的学习循环对计算、内存带宽和互连提出了特殊的要求，需要能够以极低延迟大规模运行的基础设施。

blocks.html_en: “The next era of research requires the next era of hardware,” said Lasse Espeholt, cofounder of Ineffable Intelligence. “We feel privileged to work with the teams at NVIDIA and Google Cloud, who were able to grant us early access to Vera Rubin. The support across both teams has been unmatched; we were up and running almost immediately and are already testing infra for our superlearners.”

sentences.en: “The next era of research requires the next era of hardware,” said Lasse Espeholt, cofounder of Ineffable Intelligence.
sentences.zh: Ineffable Intelligence 联合创始人 Lasse Espeholt 表示：“下一个研究时代需要下一个硬件时代。”

sentences.en: “We feel privileged to work with the teams at NVIDIA and Google Cloud, who were able to grant us early access to Vera Rubin.
sentences.zh: “我们很荣幸能够与 NVIDIA 和 Google Cloud 的团队合作，他们让我们能够尽早访问 Vera Rubin。

sentences.en: The support across both teams has been unmatched; we were up and running almost immediately and are already testing infra for our superlearners.”
sentences.zh: 两支球队的支持都是无与伦比的；我们几乎立即启动并运行，并且已经在为我们的超级学习者测试基础设施。”

blocks.html_en: NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 is designed for this kind of agentic training, delivering predictable latency, high utilization and significantly more intelligence per dollar than previous-generation systems, making it a natural platform choice for large-scale reinforcement learning.

sentences.en: NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 is designed for this kind of agentic training, delivering predictable latency, high utilization and significantly more intelligence per dollar than previous-generation systems, making it a natural platform choice for large-scale reinforcement learning.
sentences.zh: NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 专为此类代理训练而设计，与上一代系统相比，可提供可预测的延迟、高利用率和显着更高的智能性，使其成为大规模强化学习的自然平台选择。

blocks.html_en: Google Cloud A5X instances, announced at Google Cloud Next, are bare-metal instances built on NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 rack-scale systems, delivering up to 10x lower inference cost per token and 10x higher token throughput per megawatt than the prior generation.

sentences.en: Google Cloud A5X instances, announced at Google Cloud Next, are bare-metal instances built on NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 rack-scale systems, delivering up to 10x lower inference cost per token and 10x higher token throughput per megawatt than the prior generation.
sentences.zh: Google Cloud Next 上宣布的 Google Cloud A5X 实例是基于 NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 机架规模系统构建的裸机实例，与上一代相比，每个令牌的推理成本降低了 10 倍，每兆瓦的令牌吞吐量提高了 10 倍。

blocks.html_en: A5X uses NVIDIA ConnectX‑9 SuperNICs combined with next-generation Google Virgo networking, enabling clusters that can scale to tens of thousands of NVIDIA Rubin GPUs within a single site and up to nearly a million GPUs across multisite configurations, giving customers a unified, AI‑optimized stack for training, tuning and serving frontier, open, agentic and physical AI models while optimizing for performance, cost and sustainability.

sentences.en: A5X uses NVIDIA ConnectX‑9 SuperNICs combined with next-generation Google Virgo networking, enabling clusters that can scale to tens of thousands of NVIDIA Rubin GPUs within a single site and up to nearly a million GPUs across multisite configurations, giving customers a unified, AI‑optimized stack for training, tuning and serving frontier, open, agentic and physical AI models while optimizing for performance, cost and sustainability.

content_html_zh:
NVIDIA Vera Rubin 已经到来，并且正在向千兆级发展。

Vera Rubin NVL72 的产量正在不断增加，其机架在合作伙伴 CoreWeave、谷歌云、微软 Azure 和 Oracle 云基础设施上运行。 Vera Rubin 横跨 30 个国家/地区的 350 多个工厂，拥有有史以来最大、最成熟的机架级供应链，以满足客户的计算需求。

Vera Rubin 平台从芯片到电网构建，可提供最高的每瓦性能和最低的代币成本。 CoreWeave 在 DeepSeek-R1 上的第一个基准说明了一切：每兆瓦的吞吐量比 Grace Blackwell NVL72 高出 10 倍——直接达到了对于功率受限的 AI 工厂最重要的指标。

通过极限协同设计提升性能

使这一切成为可能的是七个芯片和五个机架托盘（Vera Rubin NVL72、Vera CPU 机架、Groq 3 LPX、Spectrum-6 SPX 和 Vera BlueField-4 STX）的极端协同设计，所有这些都是作为单个系统设计的，而不是由单独的现成产品组装而成。

NVIDIA Vera CPU 位于其核心。 它重新定义了人工智能工厂 CPU 的含义。 其定制 Olympus 内核专为代理时代而设计和构建，与竞争对手的小芯片设计相比，可提供 2 倍的单线程性能、3 倍的内核间带宽和 40% 的低内存延迟，使其成为最高效的单线程 CPU，适用于最重要的代理工作负载。

通过专用网络加速人工智能工厂

在网络方面，该平台的第六代 NVLink 扩展功能可在复杂工作负载上提供超过 2 倍的吞吐量、比现成以太网低 3 倍的延迟和高 10 倍的数据包速率。 对于横向扩展，Spectrum-X 以太网结合了 102.4T Spectrum-6 交换机系统、1.6T ConnectX-9 SuperNIC、自适应路由、高级拥塞控制、遥测和开放操作系统支持，使 RDMA 带宽比现成的以太网高 1.6 倍。

包括 CoreWeave、微软、SpaceXAI 和 Tesla 在内的世界领先的人工智能基础设施建设商是首批引入 Spectrum-6 交换机以加速其人工智能工厂的公司之一。 与可插拔收发器相比，采用共同封装光学器件进行横向扩展的 NVIDIA Photonics（业内首款批量生产的此类交换机）的功耗降低了 5 倍，MTBI 提高了 10 倍，CoreWeave、Lambda 和 OCI 是首批采用者之一。

Spectrum-XGS 以太网以 1.9 倍的多站点吞吐量扩展了跨站点的性能，因为千兆级 AI 不是单一的构建问题。

NVLink Fusion 向第三方 XPU 开放 NVIDIA 基础设施平台，让合作伙伴能够在经过验证的 NVLink 扩展堆栈和生态系统上更快地进入市场。

节省设置时间和水

NVIDIA 的三代机架级协同设计产生了 Vera Rubin NVL72 系统，托盘中没有电缆、风扇或软管，将计算托盘组装时间从几小时缩短到一分钟。

45摄氏度液冷入口温度设计可实现无冷却器干冷器运行。 对于新的人工智能工厂来说，这种更高温度的干式冷却以及闭环液体冷却系统每年每兆瓦可节省数百万加仑的水。

7 月 21 日星期二上午 8:00 PT🔗

NVIDIA Vera Rubin 为欧洲开放模式时代提供动力

Vera Rubin 正在为欧洲的人工智能基础设施提供下一代性能。

这是微软和米斯特拉尔新扩大的合作伙伴关系的基础，该合作伙伴关系将前沿人工智能引入该地区，将开放的欧洲模型与云和客户控制的环境相结合，以便政府和受监管行业可以按照自己的条件采用它。

支撑这一合作伙伴关系的是一项价值数十亿美元的新协议，重点是扩大欧洲的人工智能基础设施。 Mistral 正在增加其 GPU 容量，利用数千个最新的 NVIDIA Vera Rubin GPU 来提高客户的 AI 计算可用性，并为训练、推理和大规模部署提供共享平台。

NVIDIA Vera Rubin 正在全面投入生产。 这台机架级人工智能超级计算机将七个新芯片联合设计为一个系统，它将利用数万个 GPU 为下一代 Mistral Compute 和微软的欧洲人工智能基础设施提供动力。

欧洲希望世界上最有能力的人工智能，在自己的法律下运行，离家较近，并完全在自己的控制之下。 而且门槛不断提高：代理系统消耗的代币比传统人工智能应用程序多 15 倍，使高效的基础设施成为战略重点。 满足这一期望需要的不仅仅是计算能力：人工智能能够有效扩展，同时满足数据控制、治理、弹性和战略自主的区域要求。

Vera Rubin 为欧洲开放模式生态系统提供计算基础。 其全栈架构结合了加速计算、网络和软件，因此模型和代理从训练到生产都能高效运行。

为企业人工智能构建的开放模型

Microsoft、Mistral 和 NVIDIA 正在共同跨公共云、云连接和完全断开连接的私有云环境提供主权就绪的 AI，将开放模型的灵活性与大规模运行模型所需的基础设施相结合。

Mistral Medium 3.5 和 OCR 4 现已在 Microsoft Foundry 中提供，并且 Mistral 模型已集成到 Microsoft Copilot Studio 中。 通过 Azure Local 和 Foundry Local，客户可以在云和客户控制的环境中使用相同的模型、工具和操作模式。

符合欧洲条件的人工智能

政府机构可以将人工智能应用于敏感的工作流程。 医疗保健和金融服务组织可以根据区域要求进行部署。 制造商可以现场处理数据以更快地做出决策。 与 NVIDIA GB200 NVL72 相比，Vera Rubin NVL72 每兆瓦的令牌数量增加了 10 倍，每百万令牌的成本降低了十分之一，从而在相同的功耗范围内提供了更多智能。

主权人工智能不应强迫组织在创新、经济和控制之间做出选择。 以 Vera Rubin 作为计算基础，微软和 Mistral 提供主权云基础设施和开放的欧洲模式，欧洲可以实现这三个目标。

请阅读 Microsoft 和 Mistral 新闻稿了解更多详细信息。

7 月 21 日星期二上午 8:00 PT🔗

CoreWeave 上的 NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 在基准测试中每兆瓦的代币数量是 Blackwell 的 10 倍

CoreWeave 采用与 NVIDIA 的极限协同设计，在 Vera Rubin NVL72 上实现了数量级的性能飞跃。

与 CoreWeave 等合作伙伴的密切合作对于将新一代 NVIDIA 加速计算引入 AI 工厂至关重要。

经过几个月的联合工程工作，CoreWeave 成为第一个启动并验证 Vera Rubin NVL72 的人工智能云，现在它正在分享来自实时硬件的第一个测量性能数据。

CoreWeave 在 Vera Rubin NVL72 上运行 DeepSeek-R1 基准测试，发现与 Grace Blackwell NVL72 相比，每秒每兆瓦的令牌数提高了 10 倍。

每兆瓦代币是决定人工智能基础设施是否能够盈利扩展的指标。 每兆瓦更多的令牌意味着在相同的功率预算下获得更多的智能，或者在显着降低的功率下实现相同的工作负载。 Jane Street 等人工智能实验室和企业将使用 Vera Rubin 平台在 CoreWeave 云上扩展其人工智能工厂。

使用 NVIDIA Spectrum-X 克服瓶颈

DeepSeek R1 的专家混合架构使所有 GPU 通信成为大规模的关键要求：每个令牌必须跨分布式专家子网络进行路由。 Vera Rubin NVL72 的 260 TB/s 全面 NVLink 6 结构消除了这一限制，使机架能够充当单个统一加速器。

CoreWeave 是首批部署 NVIDIA Spectrum-X 以太网 SN6600-LD 作为 Vera Rubin NVL72 交换结构的公司之一。

CoreWeave 基于 102.4 Tb/s Spectrum-6 交换机芯片构建，采用液冷设计，部署密集交换机架，每个机架提供 1.64 Pb/s 的速度，容量比上一代风冷交换机高出 100%。 CoreWeave 还提供完全无阻塞、多平面、多轨脊叶结构，连接 Vera Rubin NVL72 GPU，无需超额认购。

7 月 21 日星期二上午 8:00 PT🔗

NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 驱动新的 Google Cloud A5X 实例，实现不可言喻的智能

NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 正在为 Google Cloud 的第一个 A5X 实例提供支持，该实例现已为伦敦初创公司 Ineffable Intelligence 启动并运行。

Ineffable Intelligence开发了新一代智能“超级学习者”系统，通过经验不断学习，以发现各个领域的新突破。

Ineffable Intelligence 的智能体直接从与环境的交互中学习，而不是从静态数据集中学习。 Ineffable 没有使用大型语言模型，而是通过强化学习开发“超级学习器”系统​​，在持续模拟、大规模并行的环境中生成经验，并将该经验快速转化为政策更新和评估。 这些紧密耦合的学习循环对计算、内存带宽和互连提出了特殊的要求，需要能够以极低延迟大规模运行的基础设施。

Ineffable Intelligence 联合创始人 Lasse Espeholt 表示：“下一个研究时代需要下一个硬件时代。” “我们很荣幸能够与 NVIDIA 和 Google Cloud 的团队合作，他们让我们能够尽早访问 Vera Rubin。 两支球队的支持都是无与伦比的；我们几乎立即启动并运行，并且已经在为我们的超级学习者测试基础设施。”

NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 专为此类代理训练而设计，与上一代系统相比，可提供可预测的延迟、高利用率和显着更高的智能性，使其成为大规模强化学习的自然平台选择。

Google Cloud Next 上宣布的 Google Cloud A5X 实例是基于 NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 机架规模系统构建的裸机实例，与上一代相比，每个令牌的推理成本降低了 10 倍，每兆瓦的令牌吞吐量提高了 10 倍。

A5X 使用 NVIDIA ConnectX‑9 SuperNIC 与下一代 Google Virgo 网络相结合，使集群能够在单个站点内扩展到数万个 NVIDIA Rubin GPU，在多站点配置中扩展到近百万个 GPU，为客户提供统一的 AI 优化堆栈，用于训练、调整和服务前沿、开放、代理和物理 AI 模型，同时优化性能、成本和可持续性。

该基础设施旨在帮助解锁下一代强化学习系统，以实现超级学习和超级智能的突破。

7 月 21 日星期二上午 8:00 PT🔗

NVIDIA Vera CPU 将 DeepInfra AI 云的编排速度提高一倍

DeepInfra 的基准测试结果显示，与其他 CPU 相比，NVIDIA Vera CPU 的速度是其他 CPU 的两倍以上，并且可以支持更多并发 AI 代理。

云平台 DeepInfra 是 NVIDIA 开放 AI 生态系统的早期参与者，使用其生产 AI 代理基础设施独立设计和运行基准测试。 DeepInfra 每周处理近 5 万亿个代币，其中约 30% 由代理系统驱动。 其云平台专为高通量人工智能推理而构建。

基准测试表明，与替代 CPU 相比，在相同的服务质量下，对并发 AI 代理的支持速度提高了 1.6 倍，编排速度提高了 2.2 倍，同时提高了基础设施利用率和成本效率。 这些结果表明，NVIDIA Vera CPU 提供了生产代理 AI 所需的成本效率、低延迟和吞吐量。

随着人工智能代理承担更复杂的推理、规划、工具使用和数据移动，CPU 性能对于协调每个模型调用的工作变得越来越重要。

Vera CPU 是 NVIDIA 针对 AI 工厂的极端协同设计方法的一部分，专为代理工作负载而构建。 DeepInfra 的基准测试强调了 NVIDIA Vera CPU 如何帮助云提供商提高基础设施利用率、提高成本效率以及在相同服务质量下支持更多并发 AI 代理。
